title: Season type catalog
description: Reference table of the eight season_type enum values with typical durations + which business_types commonly use each. Loaded by the SeasonSeedingStrategy binding at boot to pick a sensible default for the auto-seeded Season on TenantProvisioned.

annual.label: Annual season
annual.description: One long season per year. Registration opens once, competition runs the full calendar year.

academic_year.label: Academic year
academic_year.description: Sep-Jun in the Northern hemisphere, Feb-Nov in the Southern. Registration opens in the previous May.

summer_camp.label: Summer camp
summer_camp.description: May-Aug intensive camp. Multiple weekly cohorts within the season.

winter_camp.label: Winter camp
winter_camp.description: Dec-Jan intensive camp. Shorter than summer; sometimes ski/board oriented.

half_year.label: Half-year season
half_year.description: Two 6-month blocks per year. Common in adult recreational leagues.

quarter.label: Quarterly season
quarter.description: Four 3-month cycles per year. Common in fitness class scheduling.

trimester.label: Trimester
trimester.description: Three 4-month cycles per year. Common in European school sports.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Tenant-defined start/end dates. Use when standard patterns don't fit (tournament seasons, event-driven windows).
